prerequisites: A Hugging Face dataset identifier in 'namespace/dataset_name' form (e.g. cornell-movie-review-data/rotten_tomatoes) for the 'dataset_name' field.

The dataset must be public. The Hugging Face dataset viewer API requires no account or token to read public datasets, and this connector exposes no credential field, so private or gated datasets are not supported.
Optionally, the names of the subsets (configs) and/or splits you want to read, which you can look up from the dataset's page on huggingface.co or via the /splits endpoint of the dataset viewer API.

authMethods.name: No authentication (public datasets)
authMethods.summary: This connector has no secret fields. The Hugging Face dataset viewer REST API (https://datasets-server.huggingface.co) needs no installation or authentication to read public datasets, so you only configure the dataset name, subsets, and splits. Private and gated datasets, which would require an 'Authorization: Bearer <user token>' header, are out of scope for this connector.

setupSteps.title: Pick a public dataset and set dataset_name
setupSteps.body: Find a public dataset on the Hugging Face Hub (https://huggingface.co/datasets) and set 'dataset_name' to its full repository id in 'namespace/dataset' form, for example 'cornell-movie-review-data/rotten_tomatoes'. This is the only required field.

setupSteps.title: Optionally specify dataset_subsets (configs)
setupSteps.body: A dataset can expose one or more subsets, called configs in the dataset viewer API (for example the 'default' config). Set 'dataset_subsets' to limit ingestion to specific subsets. You can list the available subsets from the dataset's page on huggingface.co or by calling the /splits endpoint of the dataset viewer API. Leave it empty to use the dataset's available subsets.

setupSteps.title: Optionally specify dataset_splits
setupSteps.body: Datasets are organized into splits such as 'train', 'validation', and 'test'. Set 'dataset_splits' to read only specific splits. The available splits are returned by the /splits endpoint of the dataset viewer API. Leave it empty to read the available splits.

sources.title: Hugging Face Dataset viewer - Quickstart (REST API, splits/configs, private and gated datasets)
